home.title: Dr. Sourav Shristi — Consultant Nephrologist & Transplant Physician, Sambalpur
home.description: DM Nephrology · Asst. Professor at VIMSAR Burla · 4.9 on JustDial. SS Kidney Care: dialysis, CKD management, transplant workup and the kind of explanation a worried family actually deserves.

about.title: About — SS Kidney Care
about.description: Founded in 2023 in Sambalpur. Run by Dr. Sourav Shristi — DM Nephrology, Asst. Professor at VIMSAR Burla, published researcher on regional CKD.

index.title: Treatments — SS Kidney Care
index.description: CKD management, dialysis, diabetic kidney disease, kidney biopsy, transplant workup, critical-care nephrology — all under Dr. Sourav Shristi.

index.title: Dr. Sourav Shristi — SS Kidney Care
index.description: Consultant Nephrologist, Transplant Physician & Interventional Nephrologist. DM Nephrology, Asst. Professor at VIMSAR Burla.

facilities.title: Facilities — SS Kidney Care
facilities.description: Six-machine dialysis floor, renal ICU, in-house biochemistry lab, and a 24×7 ambulance service in Sambalpur.

international_patients.title: Remote consultations — SS Kidney Care
international_patients.description: Out of Sambalpur? Send your reports on WhatsApp; Dr. Shristi writes back within 24 hours with a sense of whether you need a visit, more tests, or just a follow-up call.

appointment.title: Book an appointment — SS Kidney Care
appointment.description: WhatsApp Dr. Shristi to send your reports, or call the clinic. We'll get back within 24 hours.
